top_priority_after_panel_recovery.reason: the page1 file-browser compiled-data envelope is largely exhausted offline, so the next highest-value move is a live discriminator that can separate A-type-specific runtime limitation from generic seed-side/runtime1 failure.

secondary_priority_after_panel_recovery.reason: use only if connect/sendme are still silent and the panel has been power-cycled but the seed-side runner cannot start.

notes: Do not continue large batches of page-local byte patching before the seed-side runtime limiter runner has been exercised on recovered hardware.
Within the seed-side runner, text-select is the strongest control sample, file-stream is second, and file-browser is the target falsification sample.
